expected_quirks: Chorus CMS (Duet design system) — class prefix 'duet--'
Summary dek is emitted twice in the rendered HTML (once in hero, once in body container) — dedupe on identical text
Series shelf ("Part Of ... see all updates") appears inline mid-article and should be treated as chrome
'Most Popular' sidebar is nested inside <article> in the DOM; pure `article` selector is insufficient
notes: Current extractor leaks tag breadcrumbs, duplicate dek, series shelf, follow-box CTA, author tag list, 'More in:' block, and 'Most Popular' sidebar. Top candidate for a new strip selector: '.duet--article--series-shelf' and '.duet--recirculation--related-list'. Also add de-dup pass for adjacent identical paragraphs.
